getColumn() - Method in class oberon.OberonScanner
Returns the current column number (1-based).

Returns the current line number (1-based).

I

IDENTIFIER - Static variable in class oberon.OberonScanner
Token type constants for standalone use.
IF - Static variable in class oberon.OberonScanner
Token type constants for standalone use.
IllegalIdentifierLengthException - Exception in exceptions
Thrown when an identifier exceeds the maximum 24-character length.
IllegalIdentifierLengthException(String) - Constructor for exception exceptions.IllegalIdentifierLengthException
 
IllegalIntegerException - Exception in exceptions
Thrown when an integer constant has no blank separator before a following identifier.
IllegalIntegerException(String) - Constructor for exception exceptions.IllegalIntegerException
 
IllegalIntegerRangeException - Exception in exceptions
Thrown when an integer constant exceeds the maximum 12-digit range.
IllegalIntegerRangeException(String) - Constructor for exception exceptions.IllegalIntegerRangeException
 
IllegalOctalException - Exception in exceptions
Thrown when an octal constant contains digits 8 or 9.
IllegalOctalException(String) - Constructor for exception exceptions.IllegalOctalException
 
IllegalSymbolException - Exception in exceptions
Thrown when an illegal symbol (e.g.
IllegalSymbolException(String) - Constructor for exception exceptions.IllegalSymbolException

MINUS - Static variable in class oberon.OberonScanner
Token type constants for standalone use.
MismatchedCommentException - Exception in exceptions
Thrown when a comment opened with (* is never closed.
MismatchedCommentException(String) - Constructor for exception exceptions.MismatchedCommentException
 
MissingLeftParenthesisException - Exception in exceptions
Thrown when left and right parentheses are mismatched and a left parenthesis is missing.
MissingLeftParenthesisException(String) - Constructor for exception exceptions.MissingLeftParenthesisException
 
MissingOperandException - Exception in exceptions
Thrown when a required operand is missing.
MissingOperandException(String) - Constructor for exception exceptions.MissingOperandException
 
MissingOperatorException - Exception in exceptions
Thrown when a required operator is missing or a predefined function is called with missing parameters.
MissingOperatorException(String) - Constructor for exception exceptions.MissingOperatorException
 
MissingRightParenthesisException - Exception in exceptions
Thrown when left and right parentheses are mismatched and a right parenthesis is missing.
MissingRightParenthesisException(String) - Constructor for exception exceptions.MissingRightParenthesisException

Root class for all exceptions thrown during Oberon-0 program analysis.

P

ParameterMismatchedException - Exception in exceptions
Thrown when the number of actual parameters in a procedure call does not match the number of formal parameters in the declaration.

Reads the next token without consuming it.
